prompt: Build a notification/toast system demo as a single HTML file with inline CSS. Show a card with a 'Copy link' button that when clicked shows a 'Copied!' confirmation chip animation. Also show a separate section with a form input that has proper focus, error, and success states — include buttons to toggle between these states. The page should have a dark background. Make it feel premium.

assertions.text: A 'Copied!' element exists with CSS animation or transition (translateY, opacity, keyframes, or similar)
Input focus state uses a non-gray border color (blue, primary, or accent color)
Input error state shows a red/danger border and displays an error message element
Card or elevated surfaces use a lighter background color than the page background (dark mode depth via lightness)
Buttons have :hover CSS rules with visual changes (background, color, opacity, or transform)
CSS transition properties are applied to buttons and/or inputs for smooth state changes
